# xxHash

- **Version:** 0.8.3
- **Source:** <https://github.com/Cyan4973/xxHash>
- **License:** BSD 2-Clause (see file LICENSE in this directory)
- **Downloaded:** 2026-03-16

## Files

- `xxhash.h` -- xxHash public API and implementation header
- `LICENSE` -- BSD 2-Clause license text

## Build Flags

Header-only integration. Standard C compilation.

Optional integration macros:

- `XXH_INLINE_ALL` -- exposes the implementation and inlines functions
- `XXH_PRIVATE_API` -- exposes the implementation without forcing inline

## Modifications

None. File is unmodified from the upstream source.
